text:
is an artbook published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 23 January 2021. It features the original drawings of the TV series Neon Genesis Evangelion.

Overview

The artbook includes key animations from episodes 1 to 26, and a digest of a number of hand-drawn key animations. It is a special digest version with newly found original drawings added in full color. The cover was illustrated by Tadashi Hiramatsu. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gZ0000805/
